## Tine 0.2.9

This patch release fixes the fresh-install project folder picker path and makes Python autocomplete less noisy in notebook cells.

### Highlights

- Fixes desktop project creation when the default projects directory has not been created yet and the user chooses a custom folder.
- Keeps the folder picker anchored to the nearest existing parent directory instead of failing on a missing default path.
- Filters Python autocomplete results by context so import statements do not surface unrelated warning and exception classes.
- Preserves useful statement completions, local names, common globals, exception suggestions in exception contexts, and underscore-prefixed names only when the user types an underscore.
- Deduplicates Python completions so local names win over matching global suggestions.

### Validation

- Tauri folder picker unit tests passed.
- UI helper and lifecycle scenario tests passed.
- Python packaging smoke test passed.
- Rust CLI check passed.
- Release version alignment passed across Rust, Python, and Tauri metadata.
- Local UI smoke test passed with the project creation surface and folder browse control visible.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tinelabs/tine/compare/v0.2.8...v0.2.9
